headline: Why Could Honeywell International (HON) Spin-Off Plans Drive Significant Upside
summary: Merion Road Capital Management, an investment advisor, released its Q1 2026 Investor Letter. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. Merion Road Capital Management reported that its Merion Road Small Cap Fund gained 3.1% in the first quarter of 2026, outperforming the Russell 2000, which rose 0.9%. Merion Road’s long-only large-cap portfolio declined […]

headline: Investors Reward Honeywell’s (HON) Focus on Its Pure-Play Automation Business
summary: Broyhill Asset Management, an investment advisor, released its first-quarter 2026 investor letter. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. The Broyhill Equity Composite declined 6.0% in the first quarter, net of all fees and expenses, lagging the MSCI All Country World Index, which declined 3.1%. After a strong start to the year, global stocks […]
